novel_features.name: Engagement Spike Detector
novel_features.description: Find videos that performed significantly above a creator's average — the ones that actually went viral.
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical video stats in SQLite to compute each creator's baseline and flag outliers; no single API call provides this.

novel_features.name: Transcript Full-Text Search
novel_features.description: Search across all a creator's video transcripts for any keyword or phrase — like grep for TikTok.
novel_features.rationale: Batch-fetches and FTS5-indexes transcripts from all synced videos; no single API call can search across a creator's entire transcript catalog.

novel_features.name: Multi-Creator Comparison
novel_features.description: Compare two or more creators side-by-side on follower count, engagement rate, posting cadence, and content volume.
novel_features.rationale: Normalizes metrics across synced profiles using local SQLite data; the API has no multi-creator comparison endpoint.

novel_features.name: Content Cadence Analysis
novel_features.description: See when a creator posts — by day of week and hour — so you can benchmark their publishing strategy.
novel_features.rationale: Computed from create_time timestamps across all synced videos; requires the local store to aggregate across paginated results.

novel_features.name: Follower Growth Tracker
novel_features.description: Record daily follower snapshots for any creator and chart their growth trajectory over time.
novel_features.rationale: Requires timestamped snapshots persisted in SQLite; growth curves are impossible from any single API call.

novel_features.name: Credit Burn Rate Monitor
novel_features.description: Track how quickly you're spending API credits and project how many days until you hit your limit.
novel_features.rationale: Logs credit usage per command in SQLite; extrapolates based on your actual usage pattern rather than a static estimate.

novel_features.name: Hashtag Trend Delta
novel_features.description: Track whether a hashtag is growing or shrinking by comparing video counts across snapshot intervals.
novel_features.rationale: Stores hashtag search result counts over time in SQLite; trend direction requires at least two data points that span multiple API calls.

novel_features.name: Video Engagement Ranker
novel_features.description: Rank all of a creator's synced videos by engagement rate (not raw likes) to surface their true best performers.
novel_features.rationale: Computes (likes+comments+shares)/views for each video from synced data; the API returns raw counts but no normalized rate.
